title: Re-root governed contracts and generated surfaces
summary: Move remaining plan-specific governed contracts out of shared-core assumptions and bind them through pack-owned declarations.
scope_items: Reconcile authority, rendered-surface, validator, documentation-family, and path-pattern contracts with pack-root declarations
Retire or relocate lingering legacy or plan-fixed control-plane assumptions
done_when_items: Shared control-plane artifacts stop encoding plan as a built-in domain root
Remaining pack-specific contracts are pack-owned or pack-selected rather than shared-core constants
